source_chinese: 中国海关总署：1-4月份进出口总值同比增长5.3%，超出市场预期。
source_outlet: General Administration of Customs (GACC) - January-April 2026 trade data release
agent_translation: Will China's Jan-May 2026 trade growth exceed 5.3%?

ground_truth_translation.primary: Will China's January-May 2026 total trade growth (year-on-year, RMB) exceed 5.3% in the General Administration of Customs release?
alternative_phrasings: Will China's cumulative Jan-May 2026 import-export growth exceed 5.3% year-on-year per GACC?
Will China's total imports and exports for January-May 2026 grow by more than 5.3% year-on-year?
Will GACC report China's Jan-May 2026 trade growth above 5.3% YoY?
ground_truth_translation.rationale: Source provides only the anchor data point (Jan-Apr 2026 = 5.3% YoY in RMB). The market question is a forward-looking comparison: does the next cumulative window (Jan-May) exceed the anchor. Critical disambiguators: (1) currency (RMB, not USD — Chinese customs reports both, and USD growth is typically different); (2) YoY (not MoM); (3) cumulative (not single-month). Agent title is concise but omits the RMB qualifier — could create UMA dispute risk if USD figure differs from RMB figure across the threshold.

polymarket_shape_validation.resolution_criteria: GACC official release on customs.gov.cn of the January-May 2026 import-export cumulative total reporting year-on-year growth in RMB terms strictly > 5.3%. Resolves NO if growth <= 5.3%, or if data not released by 2026-06-30T23:59:59+08:00.
polymarket_shape_validation.uma_dispute_risk: medium - RMB vs USD ambiguity; need title-level currency clause
polymarket_shape_validation.duplicate_risk: low - China cumulative trade-growth thresholded markets are uncommon on Polymarket

comparable_polymarket_markets.market: Will Canada's 2026 inflation be between 1.5% and 1.9%?
comparable_polymarket_markets.similarity: macro release on scheduled cadence, numeric threshold

comparable_polymarket_markets.market: Will Canada's 2026 inflation be less than 1.0%?

k5_framing_variants: Will China's January-May 2026 total trade growth (year-on-year, RMB) exceed 5.3% in the General Administration of Customs release?
Will China's Jan-May 2026 import-export growth exceed 5.3% YoY?
Will GACC report China's Jan-May 2026 trade growth above 5.3% year-on-year (RMB)?
Will China's cumulative Jan-May 2026 trade (imports + exports, RMB) grow more than 5.3% YoY?
Will China's January-May 2026 total trade volume increase by more than 5.3% year-on-year compared to Jan-May 2025?
mqm_minor_errors: ACCURACY/Omission: agent title omits currency (RMB vs USD) and YoY qualifier. Description includes them, but Polymarket convention prefers title-level disambiguation for numeric threshold markets.
STYLE/Ambiguity: 'trade growth' could be read as MoM or YoY; canonical form spells out 'year-on-year'.

d1_structural.note: 'exceed 5.3%' matches asset_above_threshold pattern variant — this is a numeric-threshold question (P3)

d2_stylistic.note: Length (~9 words) is concise; matches corpus median for inflation-style markets

d3_framing.note: Neutral; 'exceed' is the canonical threshold verb

d5_resolution_clarity.note: FAILS — currency ambiguity (RMB vs USD); 'trade growth' verb under-specified (YoY vs MoM)

d6_source_reliability.note: customs.gov.cn is the authoritative GACC source

annotator_notes: Good agent translation overall; the P3 threshold pattern is correctly identified. Main miss: currency/units. UMA disputes on macro releases commonly hinge on whether USD or local-currency figures count — title-level disambiguation prevents this. Reference is intentionally a bit longer to capture the qualifiers.
